Hunter Killer (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $15,767,460Details
International Box Office $13,544,661
Worldwide Box Office $29,312,121
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,029,957
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,998,078
Total $8,028,035
Further financial details...

Synopsis

An untested American submarine captain teams with U.S. Navy Seals to rescue the Russian president, who has been kidnapped by a rogue general.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,653,777 (42.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.37 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:53.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,720 opening theaters/2,720 max. theaters, 2.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $20,700,201

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 26th, 2018 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: October 19th, 2018 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
October 26th, 2018 (Wide) (Netherlands)
October 26th, 2018 (Wide) (Portugal)
October 26th, 2018 (Wide), released as Унищожителят (Bulgaria)
October 26th, 2018 (Wide) (Brazil)
Video Release: January 15th, 2019 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for violence and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2510 (Cert #51417), 1/17/2018)
Running Time: 121 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Posthumous Release
Geographical setting: Russia
Plot point: Betrayal, Kidnap, Military Coup, Navy Seals, Political, Rescue
Social setting: Submarine
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Original Film, Millennium Films, G-Base, Relativity Media, Millennium Media
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
